_validation_note: Executes user-supplied python_code on the FULL input DataFrame (vectorized, operating in-place on `df`). python_code is REQUIRED (presence checked in _validate_config; emptiness re-checked in _process). The code runs via exec() in a namespace exposing df, pd, np, context (a flat dict), globalMap, routines (and each routine by name) plus common builtins -- this is UNSANDBOXED full-Python (surface_code_cells flags it highest-priority for the human gate). output_columns is an optional list of column NAMES to keep in the output; when omitted or empty ALL columns are kept (names absent from df are skipped with a warning). Prefer explicit .astype(float) on decimal/string columns used in arithmetic. execution_mode selects the engine execution strategy (default 'hybrid' auto-selects batch vs streaming by data size). Empty or None input returns an empty main with no code execution.
